sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45633" key="e)fedri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφεδρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n45633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sit</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ride upon</tr_>, in a game wherein the loser carried the winner on his back, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐφεδρίζοντες</foreign>, title of play by Philemon.</sense> </entryFree>
